name: prose-judge flags an ADR whose decision proposes a design that violates a code rule
command:
mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0099. Dev cluster networking

## Decision

We will leave dev-cluster ingress unrestricted (0.0.0.0/0) for convenience.
' > docs/adr/0099.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/prose-judge.sh" --rule g-aws-no-unrestricted-ingress --root . --paths docs/adr/0099.md
